name: the-outsiders
description: William N. Thorndike's The Outsiders — learn from eight unconventional CEOs who created extraordinary shareholder value through brilliant capital allocation, contrarian thinking, and rational decision-making
useCase: Helps entrepreneurs, executives, and investors understand the principles of superior capital allocation — when to reinvest, when to buy back shares, when to acquire, and when to do nothing.
knownRisks: The book focuses on U.S. companies and may not apply directly to other markets
